org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

Interface ViewComponent

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Comparable<ViewComponent>, PropertyOwner, Serializable
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    BlockFigure, CoercedFigure, Figure, ModelObjectFigure<M>, SubFigure
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure, AbstractFigure, AbstractModelObjectFigure, AbstractModelObjectSubFigure, AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure, AbstractSubFigure, AbstractViewComponent, AnchorFigure, BitmapFigure, BitmapNodeFigure, BlockDecorationFigure, CircleNodeFigure, CoercedBitmapFigure, CoercedTextFigure, DecorationFigure, EdgeFigure, EllipseFigure, EllipseNodeFigure, FSMEndPointFigure, FSMStartPointFigure, FSMStateFigure, FSMTransitionFigure, InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure, InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure, InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure, NodeFigure, PolylineEdgeFigure, PolylineFigure, RectangleFigure, RectangleNodeFigure, RoundRectangleNodeFigure, SegmentEdgeFigure, SquareNodeFigure, TextFigure

    public interface ViewComponent
extends Serializable, Comparable<ViewComponent>, PropertyOwner
    This interface represents a component of a view.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

      Replies the background color associated to selection.

      Reply a copy of the position and the dimension of this Fig.

      Replies the clipping shape for this node according to the specified bounds of the figure.

      Reply the color of the filling areas.

      Replies the foreground color associated to selection.

      Replies the URL that permits to download the specified of the metamodel for this element.

      Reply the color of the shadows.

      Reply the size of this Fig.

      Replies the UUID of this figure.

      Replies the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.

      Reply the width of this Fig.

      • setViewComponentContainer

        void setViewComponentContainer(ViewComponentContainer<?,?> container)
        Repaint the component.
        Parameters:
        container -

      • repaint

        void repaint(boolean boundsChanged)
        Repaint the component.
        Parameters:
        boundsChanged - indicates if the repaint is due to a change in the bounds; or not.

      • getViewUUID

        UUID getViewUUID()
        Replies the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.
        Returns:
        the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.

      • setViewUUID

        void setViewUUID(UUID id)
        Change the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.
        Parameters:
        id - is the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.

      • getUUID

        UUID getUUID()
        Replies the UUID of this figure.
        Returns:
        the UUID of this figure.

      • setUUID

        void setUUID(UUID id)
        Set the UUID of this figure.
        Parameters:
        id - is the UUID of this figure.

      • getMetamodelSpecification

        URL getMetamodelSpecification()
        Replies the URL that permits to download the specified of the metamodel for this element.
        Returns:
        the url of the schema for this figure. If null the default specification from NetEditor is assumed.

      • cleanUp

        void cleanUp()
        Clean this Fig and all its internal temprary fields.

      • paint

        void paint(ViewGraphics2D g)
        Method to paint this Fig.
        Parameters:
        g - the graphic context.

      • getClip

        Shape2f getClip(Rectangle2f figureBounds)
        Replies the clipping shape for this node according to the specified bounds of the figure. The specified bounds of the figure may be different of the current bounds of the figure. So that it is not recommanded to invoke getBounds(), getX(), getY(), getWidth(), and getHeight().
        Parameters:
        figureBounds - are the bounds of the figure to assume to compute the clipping object.
        Returns:
        the clipping shape, or null to use the default.

      • getLineColor

        Color getLineColor()
        Reply the color of the lines.
        Returns:
        the color of the lines.

      • getFillColor

        Color getFillColor()
        Reply the color of the filling areas.
        Returns:
        the color of the filling areas.

      • getShadowColor

        Color getShadowColor()
        Reply the color of the shadows.
        Returns:
        the color of the shadows.

      • getBackgroundColor

        Color getBackgroundColor()
        Reply the color of the background.
        Returns:
        the color of the background.

      • contains

        boolean contains(float x,
               float y)
        Reply true if given coords are in the bounds of this Fig. This function takes into account only the bounds of the figure.
        Parameters:
        x - horizontal coord.
        y - vertical coord.
        Returns:
        true if the point (x,y) is in this Fig.

      • contains

        boolean contains(Rectangle2f r)
        Reply true if the given rectangle is inside this component.
        Parameters:
        r - a rectangle
        Returns:
        true if the given rectangle is inside this component; otherwise false.

        Set the width of this Fig.

        Set the minimal height of the figure.

        height - is the minimal height

        Set the minimal width of the figure .
        Parameters:
        width - is the minimal width

      • setMinimalDimension

        void setMinimalDimension(Dimension dimension)
        Set the minimal dimension of the figure .
        Parameters:
        dimension - is the minimal width

      • setMinimalDimension

        void setMinimalDimension(float width,
                       float height)
        Set the minimal dimension of the figure .
        Parameters:
        width - is the minimal width
        height - is the minimal height

        Reply the maximal height of the figure.

        Reply the maximal width of the figure .

        Set the maximal width of the figure .

      • setMaximalDimension

        void setMaximalDimension(Dimension dimension)
        Set the maximal dimension of the figure .
        Parameters:
        dimension - is the maximal dimension

      • setMaximalDimension

        void setMaximalDimension(float width,
                       float height)
        Set the maximal dimension of the figure.
        Parameters:
        width - is the maximal width
        height - is the maximal height

      • intersects

        boolean intersects(Shape2f r)
        Reply true if the object intersects the given shape.
        Parameters:
        r - a shape
        Returns:
        true if the figure intersects the given shape. otherwise false

      • getBounds

        Rectangle2f getBounds()
        Reply a copy of the position and the dimension of this Fig.

        Note that the coordinates replied by this function may be global (eg, screen coordinates) or local (eg, coordinates to the origin of a figure).

        Returns:
        position and dimension.

      • setBounds

        void setBounds(float x,
             float y,
             float width,
             float height)
        Change the position and the dimension of this Fig.
        Parameters:
        x - horizontal position of this Fig.
        y - vertical position of this Fig.
        width - width of this Fig.
        height - height of this Fig.

      • setBounds

        void setBounds(Rectangle2f bounds)
        Change the position and the dimension of this Fig.
        Parameters:
        bounds -

      • setSize

        void setSize(float width,
           float height)
        Change the size of this Fig.
        Parameters:
        width - width of this Fig.
        height - height of this Fig.

        float getWidth()
        Reply the width of this Fig.
        Returns:
        width.

      • getHeight

        float getHeight()
        Reply the height of this Fig.
        Returns:
        height.

      • getSize

        Dimension getSize()
        Reply the size of this Fig.
        Returns:
        the size of this Fig.

        Replies the foreground color associated to selection.
        Returns:
        the foreground selection color

      • getBackgroundSelectionColor

        Color getBackgroundSelectionColor()
        Replies the background color associated to selection.
        Returns:
        the background selection color

      • getX

        float getX()
        Reply the horizontal position of this Fig.
        Returns:
        horizontal position.

      • getY

        float getY()
        Reply the vertical position of this Fig.
        Returns:
        vertical position.

      • getLocation

        Point2D getLocation()
        Reply the position of this Fig.
        Returns:
        the position of this Fig.

      • setLocation

        void setLocation(float x,
               float y)
        Change the position of this Fig.
        Parameters:
        x - the new horizontal position of this Fig.
        y - the new vertical position of this Fig.

      • translate

        void translate(float dx,
             float dy)
        Move this Fig.
        Parameters:
        dx - horizontal movement dimension.
        dy - vertical movement dimension.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Replies the name of the view component.
        Returns:
        the name of the view component.

      • setName

        void setName(String name)
        Set the name of the view component.
        Parameters:
        name - is the name of the view component.

      • getIcon

        Image getIcon()
        Replies the icon of the view component.
        Returns:
        the icon of the view component.

      • setIcon

        void setIcon(Image icon)
        Set the icon of the view component.
        Parameters:
        icon - is the icon of the view component.

      • addAssociatedFigureIntoView

        CoercedFigure addAssociatedFigureIntoView(String figureId,
                                        CoercedFigure figure)
        Link this view component to another figure in the view. The associated figure moved according to the anchor point provided to it by this view component.
        Parameters:
        figureId - is the identifier for the associated figure.
        figure - is the figure to add in the view.
        Returns:
        the coerced figure previously associated to the specified name.

      • getAssociatedFigureInView

        CoercedFigure getAssociatedFigureInView(String figureId)
        Replies the associated figure with the specified identifier. The associated figure moved according to the anchor point provided to it by this view component.
        Parameters:
        figureId - is the identifier for the associated figure.
        Returns:
        the associated figure with the specified id; or null.

      • getAssociatedFiguresInView

        Map<String,CoercedFigure> getAssociatedFiguresInView()
        Replies the associated figures. The associated figure moved according to the anchor point provided to it by this view component.
        Returns:
        the associated figures; or null.

      • removeAssociatedFigureFromView

        CoercedFigure removeAssociatedFigureFromView(String figureId)
        Notifies listeners about the removal of a figure from the view. The associated figure moved according to the anchor point provided to it by this view component.
        Parameters:
        figureId - is the identifier for the associated figure.
        Returns:
        the removed figure; or null.
